# AEROVA - Enterprise Drone Solutions

## COMPANY OVERVIEW
Company Name: AEROVA
Website: https://www.aerova.cc
Industry: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) / Drone Technology
Business Focus: Enterprise-grade drone platforms and integrated solutions for industrial inspection, agriculture, public safety, and surveying.
Core Competencies: Flight control systems, autonomous sensing, fleet scheduling, data analytics platform.

## KEY METRICS
- Longest single-flight endurance: 240 minutes
- Project delivery coverage: 64 countries
- Cumulative safe flights: 1.2 million+
- Mission success rate: 99.6%

## PRODUCT LINEUP

### 1. Inspection Drones (Long-Endurance Series)
- Product ID: Inspection
- Series: Long-Endurance Series
- Description: Combines vertical take-off with fixed-wing cruise for flexible deployment and extended range, designed specifically for inspection in complex environments.
- Specifications:
  - Max Endurance: 60 minutes
  - Cruise Radius: 10 km
  - Payload Capacity: 7.8 kg
  - Wind Resistance: Level 6
- Primary Applications: Energy infrastructure inspection, transmission line monitoring, wind turbine inspection.

### 2. Agriculture Drones (Heavy-Lift Series)
- Product ID: Agriculture
- Series: Heavy-Lift Series
- Description: High-payload architecture meets extended endurance and raw power, purpose-built to cover more acres, spray more crops, and work longer hours without skipping a beat.
- Specifications:
  - Max Payload: 89 kg
  - Endurance: 60 minutes
  - Spraying System: Centrifugal Nozzles
  - Ingress Rating: IP55
- Primary Applications: Crop spraying, precision agriculture, farm monitoring.

### 3. Industrial Multi-mission Drones (Unattended Series)
- Product ID: Industrial Multi-mission
- Series: Unattended Series
- Description: Engineered with high-load capacity, multi-layered redundancy, and uncompromising stability, powered by a propulsion system built for the toughest industrial missions.
- Specifications:
  - Endurance: 60 minutes
  - Operating Temperature: -20 to 55°C
  - Deployment Mode: Fixed / Mobile
  - Wind Resistance: 10 m/s
- Primary Applications: Industrial facility monitoring, security patrol, multi-sensor data collection.

## SOLUTIONS

### Energy & Power Inspection
- Solution ID: energy
- Description: Recurring autonomous inspection of transmission lines, wind turbines and solar arrays, with AI defect detection replacing high-risk manual climbing.
- Key Features: 3D corridor modeling, Infrared thermography, Automatic defect grading & alerts.
- Target Industries: Utilities, renewable energy, power generation.

### Surveying & Mapping
- Solution ID: survey
- Description: Centimeter-level aerial survey and orthophoto production, rapidly building a wide-area digital twin and shortening field cycles.
- Key Features: RTK survey without GCPs, Real-scene 3D reconstruction, DOM / DSM deliverables.
- Target Industries: Land surveying, civil engineering, urban planning.

### Public Safety & Emergency
- Solution ID: security
- Description: Pre-positioned docks enable one-tap launch on incident, delivering a real-time aerial view and on-scene situational awareness.
- Key Features: Second-level response, Day/night dual-sensor detection, Live command link relay.
- Target Industries: Public safety, emergency response, law enforcement.

### Smart Agriculture & Forestry
- Solution ID: agri
- Description: Multispectral remote sensing monitors crop health and forestry resources, supporting precise management decisions through a data platform.
- Key Features: Multispectral health analysis, Forest resource survey, Disease zone early warning.
- Target Industries: Agriculture, forestry, environmental monitoring.

## CAPABILITIES

### Flight Platforms
In-house flight control and redundant propulsion across VTOL, multirotor and other airframes.

### Autonomous Sensing
Multi-sensor fusion positioning and omnidirectional obstacle avoidance for stable flight in weak-signal environments.

### Fleet Scheduling
Docks and cloud scheduling work together to support swarm formations and unattended recurring missions.

### Data Platform
An integrated pipeline from capture to AI analysis, delivering decision-ready industry results.
